error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the WLED controller. Please check the IP address and ensure the device is powered on.

init.title: Configure WLED Revive
init.description:
Update your connection settings.

💡 **Recommendation:** To prevent the IP address from changing in the future, it is highly recommended to set a Static IP (DHCP Reservation) for your WLED board inside your router's settings.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the new IP address. Please check the IP and ensure the device is powered on.
